name: SamurAI Shield :: Windows Update
description: Input contract for playbooks/windows_update_with_evidence.yml (repo: prfsouto/samurai-aap-playbooks). HOSTNAMES is auto-filled by SamurAI Shield from the governed asset and hidden from the operator form.

spec.question_description: Space-separated list of Windows hosts (comma also accepted). Filled automatically by SamurAI Shield from the selected asset — do not type it by hand.
Check searches Windows Update and reports what is applicable. Apply installs the updates found.
true lets the playbook restart the target after Apply, and only when the host reports a pending reboot.
Comma-separated Windows Update categories. Drivers, FeaturePacks and ServicePacks are NOT included unless added here.
Comma-separated KB ids or title regexes to skip (e.g. KB5001330,KB5003173). Leave blank to install everything in the selected categories.
default honours the WSUS server configured on the host; windows_update goes straight to Microsoft.
summary = counts only; package = one line per update (max 300); full = complete win_updates payload (very large logs).
Rolling batch size. 1 patches the wave strictly one host at a time.
Refuse to update when the system drive has less than this much free space.
How long to wait for the host to come back when ALLOW_REBOOT actually reboots it.
true runs the update tasks as SYSTEM (runas) to avoid the WinRM double hop when reaching WSUS. Set false only when the connection already uses CredSSP or Kerberos delegation.
Base directory on the target where the structured evidence files are written.
